creator: lbartoletti@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Vladimir Kondratyev from comment #35)
Thanks,

So I try to (kld)load and unload ums and the keyboard doesn't work either.

I also have a trackball (https://www.logitech.com/en-us/products/mice/mx-ergo-wireless-trackball-mouse.html) with an usb dongle.

If I insert the dongle in the usb keybord port, FreeBSD crashes : 


https://ibb.co/0mqRxqN
